scripts.build:vercel: npx prisma generate --schema=packages/shared/src/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=@chatisha/shared && npm run build --workspace=@chatisha/web
scripts.build:control-plane: npx prisma generate --schema=packages/shared/src/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=@chatisha/shared && npm run build --workspace=@chatisha/control-plane
